title: Cyrillic guide slugs render 404 on public guide profile
evidence: screenshots/guide-detail-1280.png
Reproduced on local prod build, dev server and live provodnik.app: /guides/жюль-верников-69f18040 → visible «Страница не найдена» with HTTP 200; ASCII slug works
src/data/supabase/queries.ts:478 .eq("slug", slug) with no decodeURIComponent anywhere in src
src/lib/supabase/moderation.ts:601 slugifyGuideProfileName keeps Cyrillic (\p{L})
steps: Click any guide card with a Russian name
actual: «Страница не найдена» — every real Russian-named guide has a dead public profile
suggestedFix: decodeURIComponent(slug) at the top of getGuidePageData/getGuideBySlug, or transliterate slugs to ASCII at generation + migrate existing; audit other Cyrillic dynamic segments

title: Public requests catalog empty for anon: anon-access RLS migration not applied to live DB
evidence: screenshots/requests-1280.png («Найдено 0 запросов»)

Anon key probe of live DB: traveler_requests returns 0 rows while an open+open_to_join request (starts_on 2026-07-17) exists and matches the policy in supabase/migrations/20260609000001_public_catalog_anon_access.sql
ERR-092 precedent: migrations applied ad-hoc, ledger unreliable
expected: Open requests visible (request-first storefront is the product core)
actual: Flagship nav item «Запросы» is always empty for guests; sitemap request URLs render 'не найден' behind HTTP 200
suggestedFix: Apply the RLS policy to the live DB (SQL editor + repair migration ledger), re-verify with anon probe; do not re-run data migrations

title: Realtime chat messages bypass PII masking
evidence: src/features/messaging/hooks/use-realtime-messages.ts:34-36 pushes payload.new raw
src/features/messaging/components/chat-window.tsx:58-64 caches and renders raw body
Both load paths mask: page.tsx:72 and api route:94
steps: One sends a message containing a phone/email
actual: Counterparty sees raw contact data until a manual refetch
suggestedFix: Wrap incoming body in maskPii inside handleNewMessage — one line, covers the only unmasked surface

title: Systemic migration drift: repo migrations ≠ live DB; blind db push would break prod
evidence: Live probe: guide_profiles.display_name still exists though 20260528154254_drop_guide_display_name.sql drops it
Public guide names currently depend on display_name (anon blocked from profiles by RLS; fallbacks at src/data/supabase/queries/core.ts:263,537 and (site)/listings/[id]/page.tsx:72,97)
Second unapplied migration confirmed (PRD-002)
steps: Introspect live schema vs supabase/migrations/ files
actual: Unknown set of unapplied migrations; applying the display_name drop now would blank guide names and break listing detail
suggestedFix: Full schema inventory (information_schema/pg_proc/pg_policies) vs files; supabase migration repair; drop display_name only after routing names through v_guide_public_profile.full_name

title: Live public catalog contains only test guides (QA Guide Test, «Жюль Верников» with Jules Verne photo)
evidence: screenshots/guides-1280.png
Live prod serves the same two slugs
Public bio is an English placeholder: 'QA profile for live role walkthroughs.'
expected: No test entities on the public production catalog
actual: The entire storefront is two fake guides
suggestedFix: Unpublish (is_available=false) or move QA entities to a non-prod project; define test-data policy for prod

title: Guide inbox «Подробнее» button links to a non-existent route
evidence: src/features/guide/components/requests/guide-requests-inbox-screen.tsx:407 href=/guide/inbox/${item.id}
No /guide/inbox/[id] route in src/app or build output
actual: 404 on every inbox card — core guide flow severed
suggestedFix: Point to the existing request-detail surface or create the route

title: Offer cards link guide profile by UUID into the slug route → 404
evidence: src/features/requests/components/request-detail-screen.tsx:614 href=/guides/${guideInfo.guide_id} where guide_id is user_id (uuid)
/guides/[slug] queries slug only (queries.ts:478)
steps: As traveler with offers, open request detail
Click the guide profile link on an offer card
expected: Traveler reviews the responding guide's profile before choosing
actual: 404 — key trust step broken
suggestedFix: Pass guide slug into the offer view-model and link by slug

title: Homepage hero image broken: black first screen on mobile
evidence: screenshots/mobile-home-375.png (black background + broken image icon)
Server log: upstream image response failed for …/listing-media/site/hero-provodnik.png 400
actual: Black void with a broken-image indicator on the mobile first screen
suggestedFix: Re-upload site/hero-provodnik.png to the listing-media bucket (or fix path); add a fallback background

title: Signup creates pre-confirmed accounts for any email with no rate limit
evidence: src/features/auth/actions/signUpAction.ts:90-99 admin.createUser({ email_confirm: true })
No rateLimit() call in the action (forgot-password has one)
No zod validation on input
expected: Email ownership verified; anonymous account creation throttled
actual: Email squatting possible; unthrottled account spam via admin-client-backed action
suggestedFix: Standard signup with confirmation (or email_confirm:false + verify), per-IP+email rateLimit as in forgot-password, zod on input

title: Server/edge Sentry sends default PII (headers, cookies, IP)
evidence: sentry.server.config.ts:24 sendDefaultPii: true
sentry.edge.config.ts:25 sendDefaultPii: true (active via src/instrumentation.ts)
Client config correctly false; src/sentry.edge.config.ts is a dead misleading duplicate
steps: Any server exception with an authenticated session
expected: No auth cookies shipped to a third party
actual: Live Supabase session cookies can be exfiltrated into Sentry events
suggestedFix: sendDefaultPii:false in both root configs or beforeSend stripping cookies/auth headers; delete the dead duplicate config

title: Traveler request free text rendered without PII masking on shared surfaces
evidence: (site)/requests/page.tsx:40,43 raw description
request-detail-screen.tsx:281,484,669 raw notes/description
All sibling surfaces (listings, reviews, offers, QA, chat) are masked
steps: Traveler writes phone/Telegram in request notes
Guide (or guest, once PRD-002 is fixed) opens the request
expected: Contacts stripped for everyone except the owner
actual: Contact details broadcast, defeating off-platform-contact prevention
suggestedFix: Apply maskPii() in public view-model builders, keep raw only for owner

title: E2E suite rotted: 5 of 6 active specs fail, 6 tripster-v1 specs permanently skipped
evidence: E2E_BASE_URL run: 5 failed / 6 skipped / 1 passed
Failures on selectors of removed sections (aria-label «Открытые запросы путешественников», heading /готовые экскурсии/, button «отправить запрос» renamed to «Найти гида»)
tripster-v1 skips: QA_SEED_PASSWORD not set — Playwright does not load .env.local
expected: Green e2e gate over core flows
actual: No effective e2e regression protection; skipped suites are not a green pass
suggestedFix: Update specs to current UI, load env in playwright.config (dotenv), unskip tripster-v1 one spec at a time

title: Uncommitted moderation fix + untracked publish_approved_guides migration must ship atomically
evidence: Working tree: src/lib/supabase/moderation.ts (approve sets is_available+slug), queries.ts (p_has_listings:false flip)
Untracked supabase/migrations/20260702000001_publish_approved_guides.sql; backfill already visible in live DB
~99% of diff lines are CRLF churn, real logic ~50 lines
steps: git status / git diff on the branch
expected: Code and migration committed and shipped as one unit
actual: A fresh environment without the migration makes all previously approved guides invisible in /guides
suggestedFix: Commit the set (migration + moderation.ts + queries.ts + revalidatePath edits) in one PR; normalize line endings separately

title: Expired requests displayed as active «Ждёт гида»
evidence: screenshots/traveler--trips-1280.png: request dated 4 июля shown as «Ждёт гида» on 5 июля
src/lib/supabase/traveler-requests.ts:97 includes status expired in active list
traveler-requests-screen.tsx:88 card mapper has no expired branch
steps: Traveler with an expired request opens /trips
expected: Expired request labeled with a renew/recreate CTA
actual: User waits indefinitely for offers that cannot arrive
suggestedFix: Add expired state to the card (badge + recreate CTA) or exclude expired from the active tab

title: Admin cannot view the listing under moderation: link targets published-only page
evidence: ModerationQueueItem.tsx:163 links /listings/${listing.id}
(site)/listings/[id]/page.tsx:22,46 fetches status=published only; queue contains pending_review
actual: Guaranteed 404 for every queue item
suggestedFix: Admin preview via admin client by id, or allow admin access to non-published listing page

title: Inconsistent anon handling on cabinet routes: blank pages instead of redirect
evidence: Anon HTTP sweep: /trips → 307 /auth; /account → 200 inline login prompt; /messages and /notifications → 200 with empty body (header only)
actual: Three different behaviors; blank pages look broken (no data leak)
suggestedFix: Align all cabinet routes to the /trips redirect pattern

title: Terminology canon: 9 user-visible violations (турист/исполнители/Биржа/готовые туры)
surface: admin/bookings, guide offer errors, disputes queue, guide excursions empty state, /become-a-guide, /help, destination detail
evidence: admin/bookings/page.tsx:145 «Турист:»
offer-actions.ts:52,60 «Турист просит…»
disputes-queue.tsx:69 fallback «Турист»
guide-excursions-screen.tsx:307 «заявки туристов»
become-a-guide/page.tsx:45 «случайными исполнителями»
help/page.tsx:60 «на Бирже»
destination-detail-screen.tsx:108,192 «готовых туров»/«Готовые туры»
steps: grep case-insensitive Cyrillic patterns in src/
expected: путешественник / гид / запросы / готовые экскурсии / сборная группа
actual: 9 stragglers; клиент and поставщик have zero hits
suggestedFix: String-level edits per canonical glossary

title: Homepage scroll cue uses deprecated term «Открытые группы»
evidence: screenshots/home-1280.png bottom
KODEX canon 2026-06-03: pair «Сборная группа»/«Своя группа»; «Открытая группа» experiment explicitly rolled back by owner decision
steps: Open homepage, look at the scroll cue above the fold edge
actual: Deprecated «Открытые группы»
suggestedFix: Rename the scroll-cue label

title: No OG/Twitter images anywhere — link sharing has no preview
evidence: grep src/app: only layout.tsx openGraph without images; no opengraph-image*/twitter-image* files
steps: Share any page URL in Telegram/WhatsApp
actual: Bare link without image
suggestedFix: Static opengraph-image for root + generated images for guide profiles

title: Sitemap: private requests, orphaned /ai at 0.9, missing marketing pages, frozen dates
evidence: sitemap.ts:50-53 includes all open traveler_requests without anon-visibility filter (crawler gets 'не найден' behind HTTP 200)
sitemap.ts:30 /ai priority 0.9 with zero inbound app links
/how-it-works, /help, /become-a-guide, /for-business, /policies/* absent
sitemap.ts:7 module-scope new Date() freezes lastModified
expected: Sitemap lists only crawlable, valuable, anon-visible pages with real dates
actual: SEO junk + missing live pages
suggestedFix: Filter anon-visible requests, add live static pages, decide /ai fate, per-item lastModified

title: Empty public catalogs reachable by direct URL: /listings and /destinations
evidence: «Найдено 0 экскурсий»
«Пока нет доступных направлений»
/tours and /search redirect into /listings; sections hidden from nav on 2026-06-30 but routes remain
expected: Either populated catalogs or closed/redirected routes
actual: Empty storefronts on direct links
suggestedFix: Owner decision: seed data vs redirect to / until populated

title: Auth page: no title/h1, errors not announced to screen readers
evidence: Title falls back to default «Provodnik — Найди своего гида»
auth-entry-screen.tsx has no h1-h6
Error block :417-421 lacks role=alert/aria-live; zero aria-invalid in file
steps: Submit wrong credentials with a screen reader active
actual: Silent failure for non-visual users; misleading tab title
suggestedFix: metadata title, h1, role=alert on error block, aria-invalid on fields

title: Guide bid form: two numeric inputs without accessible names
evidence: bid-form-panel.tsx:528 headcount input (adjacent text not associated)
bid-form-panel.tsx:562 price input with placeholder-only label; 1 htmlFor per 8 inputs
steps: Open bid panel with assistive tech
expected: Every input has an accessible name
actual: Two unnamed numeric fields in the money-bearing form
suggestedFix: label/htmlFor or aria-label on both fields

title: Rate limiting fails open without Redis env; LLM parse endpoint unbudgeted
evidence: src/lib/rate-limit.ts:69-130: missing/erroring STORAGE_KV_REST_API_URL/TOKEN → all limits return success
.env.local has no STORAGE_KV vars; prod Vercel env not verifiable from this audit
steps: Remove/lose Redis env, POST /api/requests/parse repeatedly as anon
expected: Anon cannot burn OpenRouter credits unbounded
actual: Silent degradation to no limits at all
suggestedFix: Verify prod env vars; fail-closed or in-memory fallback for the LLM budget path

title: «Переключиться на гида» menu item is a dead end for travelers
evidence: navigation.ts:134 roleSwitch traveler → /guide
proxy bounces pure travelers back to /trips (strict roleHasAccess)
steps: As traveler, open account drawer, click «Переключиться на гида»
actual: Bounce back to /trips — visible no-op
suggestedFix: Point to /become-a-guide (or /auth?role=guide) or hide the item for travelers

title: Legacy public /guide/[id] redirect unreachable for its audience
evidence: Page is a permanentRedirect to /guides/[slug]
role-routing.ts:51-56 requires guide role for the whole /guide tree → anon sent to /auth, travelers to /trips before the redirect runs
robots.ts:8 additionally disallows /guide/ (see PRD-031)
steps: Open /guide/<uuid> as a guest (old external link)
actual: Auth wall; combined with PRD-007 there is no working uuid entry path at all
suggestedFix: Exempt (site)/guide/[id] from the role guard or move the redirect into proxy before the auth check

title: Raw Supabase/Error messages surfaced to users in several actions
surface: offer-actions, guide booking actions, moderation actions, join-request, admin guide actions
evidence: offer-actions.ts:249,361
guide/bookings/[bookingId]/actions.ts:37,127
moderateListing.ts:36,49; moderateReply.ts:36,49
join-request-action.ts:60
admin/guides/[id]/actions.ts:38,65,92
steps: Trigger a DB error in any listed action
actual: Raw PostgREST/Error.message shown
suggestedFix: Reuse the disputes friendlyError mapping pattern

title: Booking form field errors not associated with inputs
evidence:
BookingFormTabs.tsx:229-262,308 — plain

errors, no aria-invalid/aria-describedby; top Alert is announced
steps: Submit invalid booking form with a screen reader
actual: Only the top-level alert is announced
suggestedFix: aria-invalid + aria-describedby per field

title: No skip-to-content link
evidence: grep skip|#main in src/app and headers — empty
actual: Full nav tab-through on every page
suggestedFix: Add skip link in (site)/layout.tsx

title: /destinations/[slug] missing canonical
evidence: destinations/[slug]/page.tsx:52-55 — no alternates.canonical, unlike guides/listings/requests
actual: Absent
suggestedFix: Add alternates.canonical

title: robots.ts disallow /guide/ blocks recrawl of legacy public redirects
evidence: robots.ts:8 disallows the whole /guide/ prefix while (site)/guide/[id] is a public 308
actual: Prefix blocked from crawling
suggestedFix: Targeted disallows for cabinet sections only

title: Kopeck→RUB math duplicated outside money.ts in three files
evidence: booking-detail-screen.tsx:891
guide-requests-inbox-screen.tsx:392
dispute-case-detail.tsx:35 — raw /100 display math (ADR-013 drift, display-only)
actual: Three drift-prone inline conversions
suggestedFix: Route through src/data/money.ts helpers

title: listing_inclusions and referral_program_config world-readable via using(true)
evidence: 20260623120000_redesign_foundation_additive.sql:31,47 — inclusions of draft listings readable by anon
expected: Inclusions scoped to published parent listings
actual: All rows readable (low sensitivity)
suggestedFix: Scope listing_inclusions policy to published parents

title: String interpolation in PostgREST .or() filter
evidence: src/data/supabase/queries.ts:158 .or(`city.ilike.%${dest.name}%,region.ilike.%${dest.region}%`) — a name containing , ) . breaks/alters the filter
actual: Filter expression breaks
suggestedFix: Separate .ilike() calls or escaping

title: Dead code and micro-inconsistencies cleanup bundle
surface: navigation.ts, BirjhaScreen, account/notifications, homepage form copy, not-found robots meta
evidence: ROUTES.search (/search) and ROUTES.myBookings (/bookings) point to non-existent routes (navigation.ts:25,34)
BirjhaScreen never imported
account/notifications/page.tsx:16 module-scope notFound() throws at import when flag off
Homepage form error punctuation inconsistent («Укажите дату начала.» vs «Выберите хотя бы одну категорию»)
Not-found pages emit both noindex and index,follow robots metas (strictest wins)
expected: No dead nav config/components; consistent copy; single robots meta
actual: Latent 404 config, dead component, import-time throw, copy drift
suggestedFix: One cleanup sprint: delete dead config/component, move notFound into component body, unify punctuation, dedupe robots meta
